title: Classic to VPC Migration
introduction: Modernizing infrastructure and workloads is a primary motivation for migration from Classic Infrastructure to VPC. Moving to VPC enables running your workloads on the latest generation of hardware and improves scalability, agility and efficiency while reducing maintenance burdens.

section_highlights.title: Migrate to Cloud
section_highlights.description: IBM Cloud offers the most open and secure public cloud for business, a next-generation hybrid multicloud platform, advanced data and AI capabilities, and deep enterprise expertise across 20 industries

tiles.title: Migrating from Classic virtual server instance to VPC virtual server instance
Migrating an image template to VPC
